creator: andrew@ugh.net.au
text:
Pressing a key on the console when the screen saver is up should get rid
of the screen saver but it shouldn't actually type anything. Its very
easy to get a menu option you dont want for example by hitting return to
get rid of the screen saver.

How-To-Repeat: Wait for the screen saver to come up and press a button that types something
ie not shift.
